display_text: Tome of Aghanim, Cost: 0: Non-purchasable consumable item with 1 charge. Its ability, Consume, can be used on an allied hero to grant them the Aghanim's Scepter buff for 3 minutes. The target ally gains their ultimate ability upgrade without needing to purchase the actual Scepter item, which can be a massive temporary power spike. The ability is instant cast and unit targeted.
search_text: tome of aghanim, aghanims scepter buff, temporary aghanims, consumable aghanims, grant aghanims, ally buff, ability upgrade item, free aghanims, ultimate upgrade, consume item, Tome
